calendar.matters:
Petition Of Edward Gee, Trustee, Ascertain Beneficiaries Of The Trust, Determine Question Of Trust Construction, And Instructing The Trustee...
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lew for Edward Gee (trustee).

The court stated that it seems section 5.11 of the trust was intended to provide as indicated in the petition. Mr. Lew explained that Amy is the surviving spouse of Howard Gee and that Kimberly is Howard's only child. The Court granted the petition to ascertain beneficiaries of the trust, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
